leadMagnets.title: Sales Call Autopsy Checklist
leadMagnets.subtitle: A Sherpa-style one-pager for your next review
leadMagnets.description: Walk a single call in minutes: capture failure moments, note buyer language, and pick one corrected move before your next touch.

sections.title: Before you listen
items: Define the decision you were seeking

articles.title: Why Prospects Ghost After Sales Calls
articles.subtitle: Evidence-backed patterns from real deal conversations

longTail: why prospects stop responding after discovery call

seo.metaTitle: Why Prospects Ghost After Sales Calls | Business Impact Canada
seo.metaDescription: Research-backed look at where momentum dies after sales calls—and how teams misread silence as interest instead of risk.

aeo.answerBlock: Prospects ghost when the next step is unclear, urgency is manufactured instead of mutual, or the buyer does not see a concrete reason to re-engage before your follow-up.

faqs.question: What is the most common early signal of ghosting?
faqs.answer: Slow or single-word replies after a strong live call, especially when scheduling slips without a replacement time.

article.intro: Ghosting is rarely random. It is usually the visible outcome of a breakdown that already happened in the conversation.

sections.heading: The credibility gap
sections.body: When claims outpace proof, buyers go quiet rather than argue. Silence becomes the safest move.

sections.heading: The next-step vacuum
sections.body: If the path forward is fuzzy, your follow-up feels like pressure instead of progress.

article.conclusion: Treat silence as a diagnostic signal. The goal is not more touches—it is a clearer reason to return.

seo.metaTitle: Sales Call Analysis | Business Impact Canada
seo.metaDescription: Turn a single recorded call into a structured review: failure moments, corrected moves, and a clear next step—without fluff.

hero.headline: See where your last sales call actually broke
hero.subheadline: A practical read on failure moments, not a generic scorecard—built for reps who want the truth fast.

aeo.answerBlock: Sales call analysis is the process of identifying where persuasion, discovery, or commitment broke down—and naming the corrected move for the next conversation.

faqs.question: What do you review first?
faqs.answer: We start with intent-to-commit signals and where the thread of mutual urgency was lost.

sections.heading: What you get
sections.body: A structured breakdown of failure moments mapped to buyer psychology—not personality judgments.

proof.explanation: Show early warning signs in the second half of the first serious call.

conversion.thankYouMessage: Check your inbox for the checklist and next steps.
